content.full_text:
July 7, 2010

Jill D.S. Maland
Assistant City Attorney
City of Chula Vista
276 Fourth Avenue
Chula Vista, CA 91910

Re: Your Request for Advice
    Our file No. 10-096

Dear Ms. Maland:

This letter confirms the telephone conversation that we had wherein you stated you are withdrawing the above-captioned letter as the city council members have changed since you wrote your request.

If you have any questions, feel free to call me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

[signature]

By: Heather M. Rowan
Counsel, Legal Division
